summary: Strict-blind external handoff return ingested: g9_experience_score_matrix_evaluator_b.json from evaluator_b_claude_system_20260409 replaces the prior internal B matrix. g9b_score_delta_record.json recomputed from frozen Evaluator A matrix and the new B matrix (score_a minus score_b; 11 nonzero cells). Repository Task B added repository_task_b_post_return_bundle_linkage in g9b_evaluator_b_declaration.json only for bundle traceability; top-level evaluator_a_matrix_ref and score_delta_record_ref remain empty as returned. No task_b_independence_class enum is forced in the declaration JSON (schema allows only strict_blind | documented_exception | contaminated). Task B review: primary classification insufficient_process_separation (automated second pass, not roadmap-independent adjudication); secondary failed_or_incomplete_independence_evidence (return omitted top-level A/delta refs). This does not establish PLAN_G9B_STRICT_BLIND_EXTERNAL_EVALUATOR_B_RUN strict-blind submission status and does not support level_b_capable. G9B closure_level_status_gate_g9b_reported remains level_a_capable.
level_b_capable_evidence_bar: Actual independence in process, authorship, and score generation; separate raw sheets and full per-cell deltas; declaration must be evidentially sufficient—structural presence of two files alone is insufficient.
